zoning_board_review.verdict: Structurally sound. Proxy + sync cache pattern is canonically validated (service-use.ts:18). Main risk: new code introducing `as any` casts.

findings_integrated.finding: Use mapped type for proxy return, not `as any`
findings_integrated.action: Define `CapabilityScopedClient` as a mapped type over OpencodeClient property keys. Cast at export boundary only. Follows service-use.ts:43 pattern.
findings_integrated.revision_to_fix_C: makeScopedClient returns `CapabilityScopedClient` (mapped type), not Proxy<Record<string, any>>

findings_integrated.finding: No try/catch in capability module files
findings_integrated.action: Proxy traps use guard clauses + early returns. Error handling at the Effect boundary only.
findings_integrated.revision_to_fix_C: Already satisfied — proxy.ts uses synchronous guard clauses

findings_integrated.finding: Synchronous Map cache is accepted boundary pattern
findings_integrated.action: Follows service-use.ts:18 precedent exactly. Document the boundary.

findings_integrated.finding: Use CapabilityId enum values in maps, not raw string literals
findings_integrated.action: SDK_CAPABILITY_MAP values must reference `CapabilityId.NetworkRequest` not literal `"network.request"`.
findings_integrated.revision_to_fix_B: Import CapabilityId from types.ts; use enum member references

findings_integrated.finding: Pre-existing HOOK_CAPABILITY_MAP type gap (Record vs Partial)
findings_integrated.action: Out-of-scope but documented. Should be `Partial<Record<string, CapabilityId>>` to eliminate `as any` at hook-dispatch-guard.ts:53,57.

zoning_board_review.import_convention_confirmed: Relative intra-directory imports (`./types`), bare specifiers for packages, `@/` for cross-module
